verbatim_quote: They have to do things I didn't do like disambiguate words. If you have a word like "May," it could be a month, it could be a woman's name, it could be a modal like would and should.
gloss: [ANALOGY] They have to do things I didn't do like disambiguate words. If you have a word like "May," it could be a month, it could be a woman's name, it could be a modal like would and sh...
